title: Insane TNT
description: Adds lots of new TNT types, from huge explosions to showers of fire and Big Chunguses
body:
Adds lots of new TNT types, from huge explosions to showers of fire, lightning and more!

The larger TNTs may lag computers and crash multiplayer servers, don't go straight to setting a huge one off, test the smaller ones to see what your PC can handle.

All of these are craftable in survival, although I may need to work on the balancing.


List of new TNTs:


Sponge TNT

Slime TNT

Night TNT

Arrow TNT

Volcano TNT

Super Volcano TNT

YTNT

Small TNT

Big Chungus TNT

Gay TNT

Sunstorm TNT

Copyright claims will be sent to websites attempting to reupload this without permission.
